title: Handoff
description: Declarative transfer-to-human config for conversational verbs (agent and s2s); runtime injects a transfer-to-human tool and runs the packaged choreography when the model calls it.

brief.description: 'auto' = LLM writes the summary; 'none' = no spoken brief; {template} = guidance for the LLM's summary.

briefSynthesizer.description: Optional voice/vendor for the spoken brief. Defaults to the session synthesizer.

toolDescription.description: Override the injected tool description shown to the LLM.
